input.command: git add src-tauri/src/lib.rs src/App.tsx src/features/debug/BranchDebugContainer.tsx src/features/diff/ReviewBar.tsx src/features/terminal/GhosttyTerminal.tsx src/features/terminal/TerminalPanel.tsx

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Simplify terminal panel: replace agent picker with plain shell

Remove the agent-specific abstraction (Claude Code / Codex picker) from
the terminal panel and review bar. The embedded terminal now launches a
default shell and sends prompts directly, rather than launching named
agent commands. Also removes unused total_lines variable in checkpoint
log parsing and renames DebugView to BranchDebugView.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
